1782-1885.

Guide to the Gross And Snow Family
Papers,1782-1885

Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell
University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:

titlepage.date:
© 2002 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell
University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell
University Library
did.abstract:
Papers of the Snow family (1782-1865) of
Truro, Massachusetts, include letters, land contracts, and a poem. Papers of
the Gross family (1861-1884) include letters pertaining to the Civil War, a
water cure, and life in Washington and Oregon.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p:
Papers of the Snow family (1782-1865) of Truro, Massachusetts, include
letters, land contracts, and a poem. Papers of the Gross family (1861-1884)
include letters pertaining to the Civil War, a water cure, and life in
Washington and Oregon.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial PDF finding aid.

scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p:
Gross and Snow family papers, #882. Division of Rare and Manuscript
Collections, Cornell University Library.
